name: Flaky Pesto Olive Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen puff pastry sheets, thawed until cold
enough to roll but still chilled
1 1.5 cups whole pitted ripe olives, wedged or coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together cream cheese, parmesan, green onions and pesto until well blended.
2. On a lightly floured surface, roll half of the puff pastry (1 sheet) into a 10x6 inch rectangle.
3. Spread half of the cheese mixture over the pastry, covering completely.
4. Scatter half of the olives over the filling.
5. Roll lengthwise like a jelly roll, starting at the long side to make a log. Repeat with the remaining puff pastry, filling and olives.
6. Freeze the logs until solid (or up to 2 months).
7. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
8. Remove the logs from the freezer for 10-15 minutes before baking.
9. Slice into 1/4 inch thick rounds. Place about 1 1/2 inches apart on non-stick baking sheets.
10. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Makes about 100.
